project_description: Offer recommendation engine for individual customers. Collaborative filtering + content-based for upgrade and add-on recommendations. Real-time A/B tests, push notification personalization, e-commerce platform and CRM integration, business metrics monitoring (CTR, conversion), MLflow for model versioning.
client_history: Client ran manual marketing campaigns — first AI personalization.
risk_patterns: Cold start problem for new customers. Behavioral data sparse for prepaid.
pm_comment: Cold start required a separate approach for 40% of base — underestimated in planning.
